_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant ATRX protein expression is associated with poor overall survival in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: ATRX nuclear staining in the tumor cells can be classified as retained (B, 81–100%), mosaic (D, 21–80%), or negative (F, 0–20%). Note the residual ATRX nuclear staining in the inflammatory and endothelial cells
details: Successfully classified MPNSTs into three distinct staining patterns: retained (81-100%), mosaic (21-80%), or negative (0-20%) nuclear staining
